content.text:
Now I have a clear view of atom N:31. From this zoomed-in image, I can clearly see that nitrogen atom 31 is connected to:
- C:29 (carbon atom, orange)
- H:32 (hydrogen atom, white)
- H:33 (hydrogen atom, white)

The bonds are visible as the connecting lines between these atoms. Atom N:31 has three covalent bonds, forming what appears to be an amino group (-NH₂) attached to carbon C:29.

Let me confirm the geomconf_index for this molecule. Based on the file name "geomconf_6138.xyz", the geomconf_index is 6138.

So the neighbor atoms of atom 31 (N) are:
- Atom 29: C (carbon)
- Atom 32: H (hydrogen)
- Atom 33: H (hydrogen)

Geomconf_index: 6138

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 31, whose element should be N. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
